allow: Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(fwa\): add FWA queue and case detail pages to portal *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(portal\): add FWA card to dashboard with /fwa route integration *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(fwa\): add Dockerfile for FWA service *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(fwa\): build FWA dashboard module inside ihop-app *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix\(proxy\): add /fwa route to forward to ihop-app *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix\(auth\): update FWA module path to /fwa *)

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName } } else { "No process on port 5000" })

PowerShell($pids = \(netstat -ano | findstr ":5100" | findstr "LISTENING"\) -split '\\s+' | Where-Object { $_ -match '^\\d+$' } | Select-Object -Unique; if \($pids\) { foreach \($p in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Killed PID $p" } } else { "No process on 5100" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; foreach \($port in 5000, 5100, 5101\) { $listening = netstat -ano | findstr ":$port" | findstr "LISTENING"; Write-Output \("Port " + $port + ": " + \($\(if \($listening\) { $listening } else { "free" }\)\)\) })
Bash(git commit -m 'fix\(ihop-app\): add /fwa/ route to handle trailing-slash redirect *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix\(proxy\): skip trailing-slash redirect for ihop-app routes *)

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); fwa = next\(\(m for m in d.get\('modules', []\) if m.get\('id'\) == 'fwa'\), None\); print\('FWA module:', json.dumps\(fwa, indent=2\) if fwa else 'NOT FOUND'\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $listening = netstat -ano | findstr ":5000" | findstr "LISTENING"; if \($listening\) { $ppid = \($listening -split '\\s+'\)[-1]; Stop-Process -Id $ppid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "Killed PID $ppid" } else { "Port 5000 already free" })

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); fwa = next\(\(m for m in d.get\('modules', []\) if m.get\('id'\) == 'fwa'\), None\); print\('FWA path:', fwa['path'] if fwa else 'NOT FOUND'\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; foreach \($port in 5005, 5173\) { $listening = netstat -ano | findstr ":$port" | findstr "LISTENING"; if \($listening\) { $tpid = \($listening -split '\\s+'\)[-1]; Stop-Process -Id $tpid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Killed PID $tpid on port $port" } else { Write-Output "Port $port free" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $listening = netstat -ano | findstr ":5000" | findstr "LISTENING"; if \($listening\) { $tpid = \($listening -split '\\s+'\)[-1]; Stop-Process -Id $tpid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Killed PID $tpid" } else { "Port 5000 free" })

Bash(DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/ihop?sslmode=disable" pnpm --filter @ihop/fwa exec node -e "import\('pg'\).then\(\({default:{Pool}}\) => { const p = new Pool\({connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL}\); p.query\(\\"SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='fwa_rule_audit_log' ORDER BY ordinal_position\\"\).then\(r => { console.log\(r.rows\); p.end\(\); }\); }\)")

Bash(pnpm --filter @ihop/fwa exec vitest run server/__tests__/services/rule-engine-runner.test.ts server/__tests__/services/rule-engine-runner.perf.test.ts server/__tests__/services/rule-engine-acceptance.test.ts server/__tests__/services/rule-engine-hot-reload.test.ts server/__tests__/services/seed-system-rules.test.ts server/__tests__/repos/findings.test.ts server/__tests__/repos/rule-audit.test.ts server/__tests__/repos/rules-library.test.ts server/__tests__/routes/rules-library-routes.test.ts server/__tests__/routes/rule-engine-route.test.ts)

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Matched:', len\(r['matchedRules']\), 'rules'\); print\('Codes:', [m['ruleCode'] for m in r['matchedRules']]\); print\('riskScore:', r['riskScore']\); print\('caseId:', r['caseId']\); print\('durationMs:', r['durationMs']\); print\('findingIds:', len\(r['findingIds']\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Batch ID:', r['batch']['id']\); print\('Claims created:', r['claimsCreated']\); print\('Sample IDs:', r['claimIds'][:3], '...'\)")

Bash(python -c "import json, sys; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); rows = r if isinstance\(r, list\) else r.get\('cases', r.get\('data', []\)\); my = [c for c in rows if c.get\('claimId',''\).startswith\('CLM-bc1811de'\)]; print\(f'Total cases in DB: {len\(rows\)}'\); print\(f'Cases from your batch: {len\(my\)}'\); print\(\); [print\(f\\"  {c['caseId']}  claim={c['claimId']}  priority={c['priority']}  status={c['status']}  amount={c.get\('totalAmount'\)}\\"\) for c in my[:5]]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('matched:', len\(r['matchedRules']\), 'caseId:', r['caseId'], 'riskScore:', r['riskScore']\)")

Bash(node -e "const r = require\('./apps/fwa/server/data/icd-cpt-age-ranges.json'\); console.log\('total:', r.ranges.length, 'shc:', r.ranges.filter\(x => x.source === 'shc'\).length, 'starter:', r.ranges.filter\(x => x.source === 'starter'\).length, 'untagged:', r.ranges.filter\(x => !x.source\).length\)")

Bash(node -e "const r = require\('./apps/fwa/server/data/icd-cpt-age-ranges.json'\); const codes = r.ranges.map\(x => x.code\); const dupes = codes.filter\(\(c,i\) => codes.indexOf\(c\) !== i\); console.log\('duplicates:', dupes.length ? dupes : 'none'\)")

Bash(node -e "console.log\('controlled:', require\('./apps/fwa/server/data/saudi/sfda-controlled-substances.json'\).drugs.length\); console.log\('blocklist:', require\('./apps/fwa/server/data/saudi/sfda-drug-blocklist.json'\).drugs.length\); const r = require\('./apps/fwa/server/data/icd-cpt-age-ranges.json'\); console.log\('age total:', r.ranges.length, 'shc:', r.ranges.filter\(x => x.source === 'shc'\).length, 'starter:', r.ranges.filter\(x => x.source === 'starter'\).length, 'untagged:', r.ranges.filter\(x => !x.source\).length\); console.log\('any medicare?', /Medicare/i.test\(JSON.stringify\(r\)\) ? 'YES' : 'NO'\); const codes = r.ranges.map\(x => x.code\); const dupes = codes.filter\(\(c,i\) => codes.indexOf\(c\) !== i\); console.log\('duplicate codes:', dupes.length === 0 ? 'none' : dupes\);")

Bash(node -e "const f=require\('C:/My Data/Tachy/iHop-Platform/apps/fwa/server/data/saudi/sfda-controlled-substances.json'\); console.log\('drugs:', f.drugs.length\); console.log\('zero refill:', f.drugs.filter\(d=>d.refillsAllowed===0\).length\); console.log\('with window:', f.drugs.filter\(d=>d.maxDispensingDays!==undefined\).length\); console.log\('regRef:', f.regulatoryReference\);")

Bash(node -e "const r = require\('./apps/fwa/server/data/saudi/cchi-ebp.json'\); const types = {}; for \(const b of r.benefits\) types[b.type] = \(types[b.type] || 0\) + 1; console.log\('total:', r.benefits.length, types\);")

Bash(node -e "const r = require\('./apps/fwa/server/data/saudi/cchi-ebp.json'\); const missing = r.benefits.filter\(b => !b.regulatoryReference\); console.log\('missing regulatoryReference:', missing.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const r = require\('./apps/fwa/server/data/saudi/sfda-drug-blocklist.json'\); const codes = r.drugs.map\(d => d.atcCode\); const dupes = codes.filter\(\(c,i\) => codes.indexOf\(c\) !== i\); console.log\('duplicate atcCodes:', dupes.length === 0 ? 'none' : dupes\);")

Bash(node -e "const r = require\('./apps/fwa/server/data/icd-cpt-age-ranges.json'\); const codes = r.ranges.map\(x => x.code\); const dupes = codes.filter\(\(c,i\) => codes.indexOf\(c\) !== i\); console.log\('total:', r.ranges.length, 'shc:', r.ranges.filter\(x => x.source === 'shc'\).length, 'starter:', r.ranges.filter\(x => x.source === 'starter'\).length, 'untagged:', r.ranges.filter\(x => !x.source\).length, 'duplicates:', dupes\);")
